{{CargoOrgan
|name=Tail of Fate
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10688
|idx=46
|description="When the Fatedrake sweeps its tail across the river of time, lost civilizations are stranded on its shores, their glory reduced to ruin — only the dragon stands at the end of days…"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=On combat start, summon a shadow dragon to attack the enemy, dealing DMG equal to 102% of ATK!
|hp=2940
|def=184
|atk=156
|rush=211
|gene1=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +140
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} RUSH +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} DEF +140
|gene4=Snail Arena, ELMT DMG REDUC +6%
|gene5=Snail Arena, chance to paralyze enemy +3%
|gene7=Snail Arena, chance to paralyze enemy +3% (Awakened)
|}}
